description: Style Note Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list is this striking pair of shoes. Girly and stylish, this pair of shoes goes very well with western and ethnic outfits. Wear it with jeans, shorts or kurtis for a cute look that is oh so charming! Product Details Blunt open toed leather sandals in dark pink Strappy upper with criss crossing straps with link styling in the centre, ankle strap and zipper behind which ends in the ankle region Soft footbed for all day comfort Upper adhered to the outsole Textured rubber outsole Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth when needed
